LAW AND MOTION 302, JAN-02-2025 HEARING ON PETITIONER JOHN CHORBA MD'S MOTION FOR HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. THE MATTER IS DISCUSSED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING. SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR ADDITIONAL INFORMATION. THE SUBJECT MATTER IS CONTINUED TO LAW & MOTION ON JAN-30-2025 AT 9:30 A.M. calendar.matters:
PETITIONER JOHN CHORBA MD MOTION FOR HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
John Chorba, 415-601-7361 Petitioner in Pro Per.
Joanne Buser, Esq. 619-237-5200 Quarles & Brady LLP for Respondent.
Court reporter: Amy Gooding, CSR #13386, 408-828-0981, goodings@sbcglobal.net.

ARGUED. Dr. Chorba contests the tentative ruling and argues. Ms Buser responds. After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER JOHN CHORBA MD's MOTION FOR HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.

Taken Under Submission.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Amy Gooding, CSR #13386, 408-828-0981, goodings@sbcglobal.net, reported. (302/JMQ)

PETITIONER JOHN CHORBA MD MOTION FOR HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2025 Continued To Jan-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RE: PETITIONER JOHN CHORBA MD'S MOTION FOR HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Dr. John Chorba, in propria persona, (415) 601-7361, Petitioner.

Joanne Alnajjar Buser, Esq., of Quarles & Brady LLP, (619) 237-5200, for Respondent.

The matter is discussed specifically the issue of the court not having courtesy copies in its possession. At the conclusion of discussion, the court vacates its tentative ruling. The parties are instructed to deliver courtesy copies as discussed at the hearing, to Department 302, forthwith. The subject matter is continued to Law & Motion on Jan-30-2025 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/MEW)
